modules.name: Module 1: Neural Networks, Activation Functions & Backpropagation Math

topics.title: Activation Functions
subtopics: ReLU dying neurons issues, Leaky ReLU, and Softmax probability distributions

topics.title: Loss Functions
subtopics: Mean Squared Error (MSE), Binary Cross-Entropy derivation
Categorical Cross-Entropy, and KL divergence loss

topics.title: Backpropagation Calculus
subtopics: Backward propagation vector chain rule calculus

topics.title: Deep Learning Frameworks
subtopics: PyTorch execution graphs, static graphs (TensorFlow) vs dynamic graphs (PyTorch)

modules.name: Module 2: Advanced Optimization, Regularization & Weights Initialization

topics.title: Optimization Algorithms
subtopics: Batch Gradient Descent, SGD, SGD with momentum

topics.title: Adaptive Optimizers
subtopics: RMSprop, Adam optimizer weight update math

topics.title: Regularization Techniques
subtopics: L1 & L2 weight decay, Dropout forward-backward scaling math

modules.name: Module 3: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) & Computer Vision Tasks

topics.title: CNN Foundations
subtopics: 2D convolution operation, kernels, stride, and padding math

topics.title: CNN Architectures
subtopics: ResNet skip connections mathematical gradient flow

topics.title: Computer Vision Tasks
subtopics: Object Detection (YOLO bounding box regression, anchor boxes)

modules.name: Module 4: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN), LSTMs & Seq2Seq Models

topics.title: Sequential Data
subtopics: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN) hidden state equations

topics.title: RNN Gradients
subtopics: Vanishing vs exploding gradients mathematical proof

topics.title: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM)
subtopics: Forget gate, Input gate, Output gate, and Cell state update equations

topics.title: Gated Recurrent Units (GRU)
subtopics: Reset gate, Update gate, and hidden state merge equations

topics.title: Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq)
subtopics: Encoder-Decoder framework mapping, teacher forcing training loops
Recurrent attention alignments calculations (Luong multiplicative vs Bahdanau additive models)

modules.name: Module 5: Generative Networks, Autoencoders & High-Performance Scaling

topics.title: Autoencoders (AE)
subtopics: Latent space bottlenecks, Reconstruction loss optimization

topics.title: Variational Autoencoders (VAE)
subtopics: Generative latent space, KL Divergence regularization math

topics.title: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs)
subtopics: Generator vs Discriminator minimax game mathematical objective

topics.title: Mixed Precision & Mixed Training
subtopics: FP16/BF16 mixed precision, Tensor Cores layouts

topics.title: High-Performance Scaling
subtopics: Tensor parallelism, and pipeline parallelism algorithms
